mapper.sql: id , sample_id, entrustment_id, design_strength, intensity_configuration, antifreeze_level, water_binder_ratio, unit_water_use, sand_ratio, design_slump, mixing_way
mapper.insert: insert into test_sample_mix_info (id, sample_id, entrustment_id, design_strength, intensity_configuration, antifreeze_level, water_binder_ratio, unit_water_use, sand_ratio, design_slump, mixing_way) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{sampleId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{entrustmentId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{designStrength,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{intensityConfiguration,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{antifreezeLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{waterBinderRatio,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{unitWaterUse,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sandRatio,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{designSlump,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mixingWay,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into test_sample_mix_info
id,
sample_id,
entrustment_id,
design_strength,
intensity_configuration,
antifreeze_level,
water_binder_ratio,
unit_water_use,
sand_ratio,
design_slump,
mixing_way,
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{sampleId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{entrustmentId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{designStrength,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{intensityConfiguration,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{antifreezeLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{waterBinderRatio,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{unitWaterUse,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{sandRatio,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{designSlump,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{mixingWay,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update test_sample_mix_info
sample_id = #{sampleId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
entrustment_id = #{entrustmentId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
design_strength = #{designStrength,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
intensity_configuration = #{intensityConfiguration,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
antifreeze_level = #{antifreezeLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
water_binder_ratio = #{waterBinderRatio,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
unit_water_use = #{unitWaterUse,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sand_ratio = #{sandRatio,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
design_slump = #{designSlump,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mixing_way = #{mixingWay,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update test_sample_mix_info set sample_id = #{sampleId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, entrustment_id = #{entrustmentId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, design_strength = #{designStrength,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, intensity_configuration = #{intensityConfiguration,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, antifreeze_level = #{antifreezeLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, water_binder_ratio = #{waterBinderRatio,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, unit_water_use = #{unitWaterUse,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sand_ratio = #{sandRatio,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, design_slump = #{designSlump,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, mixing_way = #{mixingWay,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update test_sample_mix_info set entrustment_id = #{entrustmentId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, design_strength = #{designStrength,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, intensity_configuration = #{intensityConfiguration,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, antifreeze_level = #{antifreezeLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, water_binder_ratio = #{waterBinderRatio,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, unit_water_use = #{unitWaterUse,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sand_ratio = #{sandRatio,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, design_slump = #{designSlump,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, mixing_way = #{mixingWay,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where sample_id = #{sampleId,jdbcType=INTEGER}
